THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, DONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 401 HYDE ST. #304, S.F., STAYED UNTIL JAN-15-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. PLTF WAIVES PAST DUE RENT. $1200- SEC DEP + 5% INTEREST.ORFEITED TO PLTF. DEFT DISM ON OR BEFORE 12/31/97 ALL COMPL W/S.F. RENT BOARD. DEFT IS SOLE TENANT. IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY PLTF HAVE AMD JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE RENT,DAMAGES,ATTY FEES & COSTS.NO FURTHER STAYS.SEE JUDGMENT FOR OTHER DETAILS
